string.text: Damn... Found my brother %s out here in %s. He was a good %s, may the Zone keep him in her glory.
No way... %s fell here in %s. We %s lost one of the good ones today. Rest easy, brother.
Bad news for us... Found %s dead in %s. He was a solid %s, gonna be missed around the campfire.
Just found %s in %s. Didn't make it. He was %s, one of ours. Big loss for the brotherhood.
Brothers, %s fell in %s. A brother of the %s left us. May the Zone embrace him.
Can't believe it. %s was found dead in %s. We %s are in mourning.
Bad blood... %s turned up dead in %s. He was with the %s, gonna miss him at the campfires.
%s is no longer with us. Fell in %s. He was %s through and through, I'll miss him, good kid.
The Zone claimed another. Found %s in %s, he was %s, one of our own. Rest in peace.
Brothers, bad news. %s fell in %s, he was with the %s. The brotherhood grows smaller today.
I can't believe it, %s dead in %s. He was a good %s, the real kind. Gonna be missed.
